name: improve-codebase-architecture
description: Identify architectural friction and design deep-module refactor RFCs.

interface.shortDescription: Find architecture friction and propose deep-module refactors.
interface.longDescription: Explores a codebase like an agent, surfaces module-boundary friction, and produces Markdown RFC proposals with interface options.
defaultPrompt: Find shallow-module hotspots and propose deep-module candidates.
Design three interface options for this architectural refactor.
Produce a Markdown RFC for the recommended architecture change.
